title: No Time to Think
description: On pages 5–8, this part focuses on no time to think, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: No Time to Think. The crew and Alabasta’s defenders race against time to stop the cannon before the city is destroyed. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I have been looking for a long time and I have to say that the

dialogue.speaker: Chaka
dialogue.text: You really think you can beat me...!?

dialogue.speaker: King Cobra
dialogue.text: I will commend you on your escape from death's door...

dialogue.speaker: Pell
dialogue.text: But even so, there's still an insurmountable gap between you and I!

dialogue.speaker: Pell
dialogue.text: I am on the level of a Shichibukai...!

dialogue.speaker: King Cobra
dialogue.text: So what if you're a Shichibukail? If that's how it is,

dialogue.speaker: Pell
dialogue.text: He's a pirate, haven't you heard...?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: It appears he's saved the princess yet again.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: He's the one who escorted Vivi safely back to Alabasta?

dialogue.speaker: Pell
dialogue.text: And your attacks are meaningless whether wet or not.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: The Palm of My Hand Can Absorb All Moisture...!

dialogue.speaker: Alabasta rebel
dialogue.text: I forgot you had that ability!

summary: This part develops no time to think and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
